evals.prompt: Is LaunchDay worth $99? I'm bootstrapped and mostly care about getting backlinks.
evals.expected_output: Explains $99 gets event featuring, podcast, influencer promo but backlink value is unknown. Recommends splitting $99 across directories for guaranteed dofollow backlinks instead.

assertions.name: price_breakdown
assertions.description: States the $99 fee and what it includes (event featuring, podcast interview, influencer promotion)

assertions.name: backlink_unknown
assertions.description: Notes that LaunchDay's backlink value (DR, dofollow status) is unknown/unconfirmed

assertions.name: alternative_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends splitting the budget across cheaper directories (like Open Launch $12, OpenHunts $9.90) for guaranteed dofollow backlinks instead

evals.prompt: What's the difference between LaunchDay and submitting to free directories like SoloPush?
evals.expected_output: Explains LaunchDay is an event (24hr, podcast, influencer) vs SoloPush is a permanent listing with confirmed dofollow backlinks. LaunchDay costs $99, SoloPush is free.

assertions.name: event_vs_directory
assertions.description: Explains LaunchDay is a 24-hour event while SoloPush is an always-on directory listing

assertions.name: cost_comparison
assertions.description: Notes LaunchDay costs $99 (if selected) while SoloPush is free

assertions.name: unique_value
assertions.description: Highlights LaunchDay's unique offerings (podcast interview, influencer promotion) that free directories don't provide

evals.prompt: How do I submit my product to LaunchDay? What do I need to prepare?
evals.expected_output: Walks through submission at itslaunchday.com/submit-product, requirements (bootstrapped, >40% discount, video interview), and how to prepare for the 30-min interview.

assertions.name: requirements
assertions.description: Lists key requirements: bootstrapped/indie only, >40% discount, 30-minute video interview

assertions.name: interview_prep
assertions.description: Provides guidance on preparing for the video interview (demo readiness, founder story)
